title: お嬢様とチェストプレス

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I take a short break in the trainers' office one late afternoon,
Mejiro Ryan bursts through the door looking like a sweaty, nervous
wreck.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: This is bad... really, really bad! Not even the tastiest protein shake is gonna fix this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ryan nervously pulls out a magazine to show me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the cover, drinking tea while striking an elegant pose, is Mejiro
McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, she does... But that's not the issue! Look at this header on the
next page!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: "The Magnificent Maidens of Mejiro, Part One."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: M-magnificent... Maidens...
choice_data_list: Wait, is the second part going to feature...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I just got a call from the magazine... But I'm not like McQueen
at all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
They're probably picturing some lovely little lady who plays violin
while longingly looking out the window! Like McQueen!
choice_data_list: Are you going to say no?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You and I have been talking about how I need to try things I'm not
good at...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm still unsure how far my talents go, even after all this time... But to
figure that out, I must open myself up to new possibilities.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: And to do that, I need your help!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Okay, prepare yourself, Trainer! We're about to explore a world previously known to only McQueen and other elegant folks... The high-class mall.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Victoria, Mademoiselle, Prim & Preen... All of these are super fancy
brands!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
N-no, I don't! Those names are just burned into my mind after reading
that magazine over and over again!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Um... Do you mind if I take a look?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling the weight of the situation, Mejiro Ryan approaches the shop.
After wavering for a bit, she takes a step inside.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, a tulle skirt?! It's even got a ribbon on the back! Ah, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: M-my thighs are a bit too jacked for this... It'll look weird.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Frilly blouses like this suit McQueen perfectly. If I tried to wear
them...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Gaaah, this is impossible!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This pattern continues for a while. Ryan picks up each piece of
clothing with a smile on her face, only to put it down again with a
dejected look in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Suddenly, she stops before a knit sweater on display.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: A pink sweater... bejeweled with pearls...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I would never ever pick something like this normally...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I gotta push myself! Yeah, just pretend you're pumping out
another set of chest presses... Excuse me, I'd like to try this on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We finish up our shopping and head home. Despite our successful
trip, Mejiro Ryan still seems antsy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I did it... I bought a pink sweater.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
O-of course! I mean, it's so elegant, so it should work perfectly for the
magazine. But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
For some reason... that just makes me more nervous. My heart's
beating so hard, my pecs are trembling!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Was that a cat? Where'd it come from?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before us stands one of the many tall trees lining the streets.
However, hanging from this one is a kitten, its claws caught in the
branches.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the blink of an eye, the kitten's claws finally give out, and it begins
to fall. It's at least a thirty meter drop!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I've gotcha, little one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ryan rushes to the kitten, sweater in hand.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Come oooon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as the kitten is about to hit the ground, Ryan manages to catch it
in her sweater.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Phew... You're safe now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The kitten wiggles around in the sweater, perhaps a little shaken, but
otherwise unharmed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I take the kitten in my arms, and my eyes go wide...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The kitten's claws had clearly gotten caught in the sweater. It's
completely shredded...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: It's weird, but for some reason, I almost feel relieved.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Going shopping at a fancy mall and getting frilly clothes... It just
didn't feel right to me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I think I was trying too hard to be like McQueen. I really stepped out
of my comfort zone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But I realized something while I was running towards that kitten.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I... am Mejiro Ryan, not Mejiro McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I think frilly stuff is cute, but it's not ME, you know? What is me is dashing in to save a kitten! Nobody can beat me when it comes to taking action!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: And... I'm okay with that!
choice_data_list: Sounds like you found another talent.
Sounds like you found another talent.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I sure hope so! And you know... I think I'm gonna do this photo shoot
in my gym clothes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan beams with pride and confidence. A few days later, I ask
about the interview. She tells me it went off without a hitch!
